title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 517.101 - Dismissal of claim or portion of claim, when
text:
517.101.  Dismissal of claim or portion of claim, when. — A pleading stating a claim or any portion thereof may be dismissed without prejudice at the costs of the claiming party when:
  (1)  That party requests such dismissal at any time before the trial is commenced; or
  (2)  A party fails to appear when scheduled or notified.
(L. 1985 S.B. 5, et al., A.L. 1988 H.B. 1660)
